course_title: SURVEY OF 19TH AND 20TH CENTURY RUSSIAN LITERATURE IN TRANSLATION II
description: Examines Russian prose fiction, Anton Chekhov to the end of the 20th century. More writing intensive thanLITTRANS 202.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Not open to students with credit forLITTRANS 202

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Not open to students with credit forLITTRANS 202
